site.title: Chayn
site.description: Chayn — a global charity supporting survivors of gender-based violence and abuse.

temp.heading: Next.js Starter Template
temp.intro: A production-ready, multilingual foundation for Chayn web projects — accessible, GDPR-compliant, and built with trauma-informed design at its core.
temp.githubCtaAriaLabel: View Chayn on GitHub (opens in a new tab)

stackItems.label: Next.js 16
stackItems.desc: App Router, React Server Components, static rendering, Turbopack

stackItems.label: React 19
stackItems.desc: Server Components by default — zero JS shipped for static layouts

stackItems.label: TypeScript 5
stackItems.desc: Strict types throughout the entire codebase

stackItems.label: Tailwind CSS 4
stackItems.desc: Design tokens, utility-first styling — no clsx or tailwind-merge

stackItems.label: next-intl 4
stackItems.desc: English (UK) and Hindi (Latin script) locales, RTL-ready architecture

stackItems.label: WCAG AA
stackItems.desc: Accessible by default: skip links, ARIA roles, semantic HTML throughout

stackItems.label: GDPR compliance
stackItems.desc: Cookie consent gate — no tracking scripts load without explicit consent

stackItems.label: Rollbar
stackItems.desc: Error tracking with IPs anonymised and fingerprinting disabled

stackItems.label: Cypress 15
stackItems.desc: End-to-end test suite with a GitHub Actions CI pipeline

temp.typographyBodyExample: Body text in Open Sans. Used for all paragraph copy, navigation, labels, and UI elements. Clear and readable at every size, with a warm, approachable character suited to Chayn’s survivor-facing work.
temp.typographySmallExample: Small text — captions, footnotes, and supporting copy.
temp.componentsCardTintedDesc: Use for featured or highlighted content blocks.
temp.componentsCardWhiteDesc: Use for list items or secondary content areas.
temp.step1Desc: Clone the repository and install dependencies.
temp.step2Desc: Copy the example env file and fill in your values. All integrations are optional — the app runs without any of them.
temp.step3Desc: Open <link>localhost:3000</link> in your browser and begin building.
temp.chaynTrackDesc: Keep the Chayn branding and assets — just add your content.
temp.chaynCheck4: Configure optional integrations via .env.local (Rollbar, GA4, Hotjar)
temp.chaynCheck6: Replace this page with your content in app/[locale]/page.tsx
temp.externalTrackDesc: Everything in the Chayn track, plus a full rebrand.
temp.externalCheck1: Everything in the Chayn project track above
temp.externalCheck2: Replace public/favicon.ico, public/og-image.png, public/apple-touch-icon.png, and app/icon.png with your own assets
temp.externalCheck3: Update the colour palette in app/globals.css under @theme inline
temp.externalCheck5: Remove Chayn branding and links from components/layout/Footer.tsx and TopNav.tsx
temp.externalCheck6: Add or remove locales in i18n/routing.ts and lib/locale-dir.ts

footer.tagline: A global charity supporting survivors of gender-based violence and abuse.
footer.chaynHomepageLabel: Chayn — go to main website (opens in a new tab)

leaveSite.ariaLabel: Leave this site quickly — opens a safe page and replaces browser history

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.refreshPrompt: Something went wrong. Please try refreshing the page.

cookieBanner.heading: We use analytics cookies
cookieBanner.body: to understand how visitors engage with this site and to improve Chayn’s content. No personal data is stored or shared with third parties.
cookieBanner.updateBody: We use analytics to understand how people engage with our resources and improve our support for survivors. No personal data is stored or shared.
